name: Send an SMS through the OVHcloud API

parameters.content:
## Send an SMS through the OVHcloud API

### How it works

This workflow manually sends an SMS through the OVHcloud SMS API. It first defines the required OVH credentials, SMS service name, recipient, and message, then generates the signed OVH request and posts it to the API endpoint.

### Setup steps

- Add valid OVHcloud API values for APPLICATION_KEY, APPLICATION_SECRET, CONSUMER_KEY, and SMS_SERVICE_NAME in the credentials setup node.
- Set the SMS receiver and message text in the payload node.
- Verify that the signing code uses the correct OVH API region, endpoint, HTTP method, and timestamp requirements.
- Run the workflow manually to send the SMS.

### Customization

Change the receiver and message fields to send different SMS content, or replace the manual trigger with another trigger to automate sending.

## Initialize SMS inputs

Starts the workflow manually, then sets the OVH API credentials and the SMS service name along with the recipient and message payload.

## Sign and send request

Builds the signed OVH SMS API request with URL, headers, and JSON body, then sends it as an HTTP POST request to OVHcloud.
